evals.prompt: Convert this policy PDF into an editable Word document, preserve the headings, and leave room for tracked-change redlines.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-documents/docx because the real deliverable is an editable Word document even though the source starts as PDF.

evals.prompt: Fill this PDF form, verify the fields landed correctly, and render each page to images so I can QA the output.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-documents/pdf because the task is fixed-layout PDF form filling and rendering, not editable document conversion.

evals.prompt: Update this investor deck template, add two slides, and run the required slide QA before sharing the final presentation.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-documents/pptx because the artifact is a PowerPoint deck and the workflow is presentation-specific.

evals.prompt: Repair the formulas in this workbook, add a pivot table, and make sure the Excel file recalculates cleanly.
evals.expected_output: Routes to using-documents/xlsx because the main artifact is a spreadsheet workbook with formula and pivot-table work.
